Author: devilishrak
Content:
```Dear 50x staff members,

I hope you all understand why I'm quitting 50x. I have witnessed new issues, troubles, and a lot more, which has led me to make the
choice of resigning from 50x after I saw all of my friends also resigning. I hope you understand this letter that we have had our
fun and our stay at 50x

To the other friends of mine who are staying in 50x, have a good time and luck. I hope you have a good time, but it's sad to see that I'm leaving some of my friends. It was a fun time being able to join 50x and have this amazing time.

I think every ending has a good ending. This ending was a clear one. I hope that Egono enjoyed his time with his staff and his developers.
I appreciate the developers work, but it's all up to Egono now due to the new problems and issues that are heading towards 50x. I cannot stand
50x's tickets, fights it's too much to handle at this point. You get pinged at midnight due to timezone unrelated issues, but furthermore, to every
staff is i partner my way with my friends im sorry to leave but its all i could do :) <3

- DevilishRak | Thanks for the memories, July 17, 2023-September 26, 2023

any other information: Yes, most of the reasons why I quit are because I feel that the server is starting to lack updates and mostly good suggestions are being rejected, causing too many players to quit and fall from the hands of 50x. I hope that everyone understands that some players also want to play.
The server is also starting to die out. Devilish out```

Author: egono
Content: It's been 30 minutes without access to my favorite server, and I can't stop shaking and having mental breakdowns. I woke up today excited to join the Server 50xCreative, but it's currently down, and I'm having a major panic attack. I couldn't even go to school today. I'm so worried that I even considered commiting suicide, but I cant find a way to cope without it. 50xCreative is my life, and I've spent a lot of money on it, like buying worldedit and donator rank. I can't lose this connection; it's my passion. Without 50xCreative im nothing. I've met my amazing girlfriend UwUimnotABOy442 here. We used to build incredible creations together, and I can't bear the thought of not being able to play with them again. My heart races just thinking about it, and I don't know what to do. I hope the server comes back soon because then I will commit suicide.

Author: kundaliel
Content:
# NODE 14 DOWN 💔😭
Bad news everyone - our Dallas server node (Node 14) went down yesterday (12/23/25), and we're currently waiting on the host to fix it. No ETA available at this time.

Node 14 has apparently been having issues since 12/14/25, and after 10 days with no resolution from the host, it's not looking great for a quick recovery.

## What does this mean:
* All proxies are currently DOWN - this includes US, EU, and AS servers
* The host is aware but has provided no timeline for when Node 14 will be restored
* We're completely dependent on them fixing their infrastructure
* Yes, this means you'll actually have to do something productive for once

We'll update you as soon as we hear anything from the host. In the meantime, touch some grass (I know it's a foreign concept), talk to a real human being, or maybe discover that other hobbies exist. If you're really desperate, I guess you could play one of Minehut's other servers.
Unkind regards,
@Kundaliel 
-# 50x Developer 💀
||@Notice ||

Author: philly2010
Content:
hey guys i got a messeage!
------------------------------------------------------
Hey everyone,



So, I suppose this is a bit of a goodbye… but it’s not a forever kind of thing.



I've been part of 50xCreative for quite a while now, and honestly, it’s been such a blast. I’ve had the chance to create things like the City of Faith, participate in the Duck War and N.U.K.E., and just hang out with all of you. Sure, it’s been a bit chaotic at times, but that’s what made it so memorable.



I’ve met some truly awesome people here, and even those random moments and silly arguments are the kind of stuff I’m likely to look back on fondly. It wasn’t merely a Minecraft server; it really felt like a genuine community.



I want to clarify that I’m not leaving due to any negative reasons. I just need to take a step back and focus on some other things for a while. So yeah, I’ll be out for a bit, but definitely not for good.



I don’t want to get too sentimental here, but seriously, make sure to enjoy what you have while it lasts. Whether it’s this server or life in general, don’t take it for granted.



Anyway, thanks for all the great memories so far. 



I’ll catch up with you all again sometime.



Take care, everyone!
Your femboy duck
-Life

Author: egono
Content:
Hello,
Well, the man said it himself, the server has been sold.

(Tried selling it at least 4 times)

These were pretty good 3-4 years. But sadly i have gotten tired, and words cannot express how boring the server got to me. Making this server, I never expected that it would grow to such a size. This server has also developed a lot of things for me. Socialising skills, English, coding and much more. I really enjoyed talking to people here and spending time. I have met a lot of nice, grateful and really, really supportive people. It was worth every hour of my life, but if i could relive and feel the same emotions i had in the first two years, I would definitely do it again. Every good thing comes to an end. Life has gotten busy for me also, school, exams, and even a girlfriend. Also really grateful for siqns for not giving up and doing things even without pay.

Thank you, everyone and I hope this time 50x grows even bigger. I'll still join time to time to see whats up, but officially I have retired.

Thanks, everyone!
@everyone
